                        -H/home/alex/.pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/pdf_render-1.4.12/android

-DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON

-DANDROID_PLATFORM=android-21
-DANDROID_ABI=armeabi-v7a
-DCMAKE_ANDROID_ARCH_ABI=armeabi-v7a

-DCMAKE_ANDROID_NDK=/home/alex/android-sdk/ndk/27.0.12077973
-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=/home/alex/android-sdk/ndk/27.0.12077973/build/cmake/android.toolchain.cmake
-DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=/home/alex/android-sdk/cmake/3.22.1/bin/ninja
